summary: High‑quality matrix recording with excellent 1976 performance, though the track title is mislabelled.
review: Both reviewers rave about this 1976 show, calling it an “excellent show” and praising the sound as crisp and enjoyable. The source appears to be a matrix mix, delivering clear audio despite a minor title‑mismatch issue. Overall the performance and recording are well received.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are strongly positive (4‑5 stars) and highlight excellent sound and show quality; with only two brief comments, confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice/crisp sound noted by reviewers; one comment about a mismatched title but no major audio issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: General praise for the entire show; no specific set‑list commentary provided.
